overview.ko: Gigacloud Technology Inc는 Technology 분야 Software - Infrastructure 기업입니다.
overview.en: GigaCloud Technology Inc. provides end-to-end B2B ecommerce solutions for large parcel merchandise in the United States and internationally. The company offers GigaCloud Marketplace that integrates product discovery to payments and logistics tools into one easy-to-use platform.

summary.ko: Gigacloud Technology Inc(GCT)는 v2 복합 점수 80.0로 임계 70.0를 상회했습니다. 소형·가치·현금·진입 타이밍이 균형을 이룹니다.
